## What does this PR do?

[1-2 sentences describing the change.]

## Type

- [ ] `feat:` New feature
- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix
- [ ] `chore:` Maintenance / config
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation
- [ ] `refactor:` Code restructuring (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit title (e.g., `feat: add user dashboard`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] No console.log or debug code
- [ ] PROGRESS.md updated (if milestone affected)
- [ ] TODO.md updated (if priorities changed)
- [ ] Security impact considered (auth, data access, new env vars)
- [ ] .env.example updated (if new env vars added)

## Security Impact

- [ ] No security impact
- [ ] Auth/access control changed — describe below
- [ ] New env vars / secrets added — listed in .env.example
- [ ] New data stored — RLS policies added

**If security impact, describe:**
[What changed and why.]
